_meta.warning: Typewise advertises '200+ deep integrations' but does not publish a full list publicly. This is a curated subset of confirmed and high-likelihood integrations from public material. A sales call should validate any specific platform a buyer requires.

zendesk.evidence: Brack.ch customer story explicitly runs Typewise on top of Zendesk

claude.evidence: Homepage lists Anthropic Claude integration explicitly

channels_native.social: native channel, includes major social inboxes
channels_native.voice: on roadmap, not generally available as of 2026-05-22

salesforce_service_cloud.evidence: Standard enterprise CS stack; Typewise positions as helpdesk-agnostic layer

freshdesk.evidence: Mentioned in Typewise blog comparison content (freshdesk-fin-typewise-comparaison)

hubspot_service_hub.evidence: Typewise's competitor-comparison content positions vs HubSpot

intercom.evidence: Sales-led positioning vs Fin assumes co-existence is possible

not_supported_or_unknown.discord: Not advertised. Outside typical enterprise CS scope.
not_supported_or_unknown.telegram_business: Not advertised on homepage. Verify with sales.
